name: Scalloped Potatoes with Crumb Topping
recipeIngredient: 3 large baking potatoes, cut into 1/8 inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
3. In a medium saucepan, gradually whisk together the flour and milk until fully combined, making sure to mix into any corners of the pot.
4. Heat the mixture over medium-high heat, stirring often, until it comes to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened.
6. Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup of cheese, 1/4 cup of sliced scallions, salt, and pepper.
7. Place the potato slices in the prepared dish and pour over the cheese sauce. Toss to coat evenly.
8. Cover with foil and bake for 30 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, mix bread crumbs, butter, and remaining 1/2 cup cheese in a small bowl until the crumbs are evenly moistened.
10. Remove the foil from the baking dish and sprinkle the crumb mixture on top.
11. Bake uncovered for an additional hour or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden.
12. Sprinkle with any remaining scallions before serving.
